testcase.name: deActiveTest

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1165, 11). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=144.0.7559.134) Build info: version: '4.33.0', revision: '2c6aaad03a' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '23.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [db0e14ac5d3a204c125d80f2546825cb, clickElement {id=f.66FF2B856FB9FB6C227A18645719C177.d.B0E72CA2C60B2EEDD456A34C99CA4012.e.85}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 144.0.7559.134, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 144.0.7559.133 (7da823b1d59..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Amarnath\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:60288}, goog:processID: 8292, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:60288/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 144.0.7559.134, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (db0e14ac5d3a204c125d80f2546825cb)] -> xpath: //button[@role='switch'][@data-state='checked']] Session ID: db0e14ac5d3a204c125d80f2546825cb
